What we translate
Document Types We Handle
All document types accepted — personal, legal, business, academic, and more. All pairs supported across 65+ languages.

Civil Documents

Birth certificates, marriage contracts, PSA documents, NBI clearance, passports, and government-issued IDs.

All pairs · 65+ languages

Employment Documents

Employment contracts, certificates of employment, job offer letters, payslips, and HR documents for overseas applications.

All pairs · 65+ languages

Academic Records

Diplomas, transcripts, recommendation letters, and school records for foreign university applications and credential evaluation.

All pairs · 65+ languages

Medical & Legal Documents

Medical certificates, legal contracts, affidavits, court documents, and apostille documents for international use.

All pairs · 65+ languages

💡 Don't see your document type? We can still translate it — contact us and we'll assess it for you.

Simple process
How It Works
Fully online — order from anywhere in the Philippines.
1

Send your document

Upload a photo or scan via our inquiry form, Facebook, Viber, or email. Any document type accepted.

2

Receive your custom quote

We assess your document and respond within 1–2 hours with a tailored quote. No hidden charges.

3

Confirm & pay

Settle via GCash, Maya, or company account bank transfer. We begin immediately upon payment confirmation.

4

Receive certified translation

Delivered digitally via email or Viber, or as a hard copy sent anywhere in the Philippines via courier.

After you submit your inquiry — here's what happens:

1

Our team reviews your document and prepares a custom quote — typically within 1 hour during business hours.

2

We'll contact you via your preferred channel — Viber, email, or Facebook — with price and turnaround time.

3

Once you confirm and pay, we begin immediately. You'll receive your certified translation as agreed.

Need it urgently? Call or Viber/WhatsApp us directly:

📱 +63 968 557 5198📱 +63 962 292 0657

Got questions?
Frequently Asked Questions
Is your translation accepted by embassies worldwide?
Yes. All our translations are professionally certified and formatted to meet international embassy standards. We have a proven track record of documents accepted by embassies in Japan, South Korea, the United States, Canada, Australia, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Germany, and many more. Our certified translators adhere to the standards required by the DFA, POEA, CHED, and foreign consulates.
How do I send my documents?
💘 Facebook: facebook.com/exceltranslationservicesph
📱 Viber / WhatsApp: +63 968 557 5198 or +63 962 292 0657
📧 Email: exceltranslationservicesph@gmail.com
📋 Quote form below — upload directly

Simply take a clear photo or scan of your documents. No need to visit our office — fully online, unless you want to. 😊
How long does translation take?
⚡ Same-day — select documents, order before 12NN, subject to availability
🚀 Rush — 24 hours — some documents, additional fee applies
📄 Standard — 2–4 calendar days — depends on complexity and length
How much does translation cost?
Pricing depends on document type, language pair, number of pages, and turnaround. Translation starts at ₱700. We provide a custom quote within 1–2 hours — no commitment required.
How and when will I pay?
Payment after you approve your quote.

💚 GCash
💙 Maya
🏢 Company account bank transfer
Is my document kept confidential?
Absolutely. We treat every document with strict confidentiality. All personal information and client details are kept private and never shared with third parties.
What languages do you translate?
We support 65+ languages including Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Arabic, English, Filipino, Spanish, French, German, and more. Contact us to confirm your specific language pair.
